name: Ed's Buffalo Snort Red Chili
recipeIngredient: 5 tablespoons New Mexican red chile powder
1/2 cup New Mexican green chiles, chopped
1 crumbled red New Mexican chile pod
1 pound Italian hot sausage, bulk, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a large soup pot until crispy. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. In the same pot, add onions and sauté until soft.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (excluding the T-bone steak) and bring to a boil.
4. Stir in the chopped T-bone steak and simmer for 2 hours, or until the meat is tender.
5. Remove the T-bone steak pieces and stir in the armadillo meat.
6. Return the bacon to the pot and add the Lone Star beer and bell pepper mixture.
7. Reduce heat and let it simmer for a few more minutes.
8. Adjust seasoning with salt if needed, then serve hot.
